title: I Want to Shine!!
overview: Chika Takami is an ordinary girl who wants to form a School Idol Club to be a school idol. She meets potential members, but how will she get them to join?

title: Catch the Transfer Student!
overview: On her mission to form a School Idol Club, Chika Takami searches for more members and someone who can help compose their songs.

title: First Step
overview: We meet Mari Ohara, who makes a deal with Chika and the others. If they can fill the school gym during their first performance, she'll approve their club despite their numbers. Will they be able to gather enough people?

title: Two Girls' Feelings
overview: Chika wants the first years Hanamaru and Ruby to join the School Idol Club, but they are both hesitant. We learn about the two and what their true feelings are toward school idols.

title: Yohane Descends
overview: Yoshiko is trying to suppress her alter ego, Yohane, but it's harder than expected. She then comes across the School Idol Club whose members are trying to raise their ranking.

title: Let's Make a PV
overview: After finding out their school is at risk of closing due to low enrollment, the girls of Aqours decide to take action and find a way to promote the town and the school they love.

title: Tokyo
overview: Aqours promo video is a huge success. The girls are invited to a School Idol competition in Tokyo, and make the trip to the big city.

title: Isn't it Frustrating?
overview: The girls get the results from their first big performance, and are forced to make some difficult decisions.

title: Young Dreamer
overview: Chika and the others discover the secrets that led to the seniors' school idol group breakup.

title: We've Got Stewshine!
overview: The girls start their summer training camp, and whip up some tasty (and not so tasty) treats to help out at the town's beach snack bar.

title: Aye aye, My Friend!
overview: Riko heads to Tokyo for her piano competition, while You faces some struggles trying to fill in for her.

title: It's Time to Fly
overview: The results for the preliminary qualifiers are announced, and Aqours takes another trip to learn more about their own idols.

title: Sunshine!!
overview: Aqours gets ready for the regional preliminaries with some help from their friends.

title: Next Step
overview: The second term at Uranohoshi Girls' High School has started. The members of Aqours have renewed their determination to keep their school alive. However, some sudden bad news brings their spirits down.

title: The Sound of Rain
overview: Despite what Mari's father told her previously, he's giving them a second chance to keep their school alive under the condition that they'll get more prospective students by the end of the year.

title: Rainbow
overview: Just when the members of Aqours are re-energized and working hard to perform both in the Love Live qualifiers and the school open house, they receive more bad news.

title: Don't Call Me Dia-san
overview: Dia realizes that Kanan and Mari seem to have gotten closer to the other members of Aqours while she hasn't, and starts wishing that they would call her "Dia-chan."

title: Taking In a Dog
overview: Yoshiko finds a dog, but she cannot keep the dog herself because she lives in a condo. So she asks Riko to keep the dog until she finds a permanent home for the dog.

title: Aqours WAVE
overview: In preparation for the Love Live regional prelims, Mari and Dia suggest to Kanan that Aqours use the formation that the three of them came up with two years ago.

title: The Time We Have Left
overview: After finishing the performance at the Love Live regional prelims, the members of Aqours now face the results. Will they proceed to the final round? Can they save their school?

title: HAKODATE
overview: Aqours has been invited to the Hokkaido regional prelims. When Chika and the others stop by at Saint Snow's dressing room before their performance, Sarah says that she'll see them again in the final round.

title: Awaken the Power
overview: With Yoshiko and Hanamaru's support, Ruby and Leah create a song dedicated to their sisters in order to show them that they'll be okay without them after they graduate.

title: Finding a Way to Shine
overview: Now that their school life is coming to an end, Kanan, Dia, and Mari decide to go search for a shooting star like they did when they were kids.

title: Uranohoshi Girls' High School
overview: With the school closure approaching, the students at Uranohoshi Girls' High School hold a school closing festival to show their love and appreciation for their school.

title: Sea of Light
overview: The day before the Love Live finals, the members of Aqours head out to Tokyo to perform for the last time. Will they be victorious?

title: Our Own Radiance
overview: On the day of the graduation and school closing ceremony, Chika and the others are determined to say goodbye to their school without tears.
